NAVAREA XIX 10/23

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  151830 UTC FEB 23

 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 65-01.5N 006-52.8E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 66-04.6N 008-14.8E AKOFS SEAFARER
 71-23,2N 022-58,3E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 NOTES:

 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.

 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW

 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　5/23
